metadata.name: Tetsu Kasuya 4:6 (Lighter)
metadata.author: Tetsu Kasuya
metadata.description: Lighter-bodied 4:6 with a single strength pour. First 40% (two pours of 60g) controls sweetness; final 60% (one pour of 180g) produces a lighter, cleaner cup. Use a coarse grind for clarity.

protocol.notes: Wait for the bed to drain
Wait for the bed to drain
Single combined strength pour to 300g total
